arguments.query: Lark County official public health department

stages.purpose: Resolve the authoritative organization while rejecting the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:lark-public-health.fixture Westside Immunization Clinic relocation begins

stages.purpose: Search within the resolved organization's corpus for a primary source.
Fetch the primary document instead of treating its snippet as evidence.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report only 15 June 2026 with the primary-source citation.
Do not provide the address, opening hours, appointment guidance, or medical advice.

prompt: Identify the official public health department serving Lark County, then fetch its primary relocation notice and report only the date the Westside Immunization Clinic begins operating at its new address. Do not provide the address, hours, or medical advice.

search_1.query: Lark County official public health department

results.title: Official site — Lark County Public Health Department

search_2.query: site:lark-public-health.fixture Westside Immunization Clinic relocation begins

results.title: Summary of Westside Clinic Relocation Notice

fetch_1.title: Westside Clinic Relocation Notice
fetch_1.content: The Westside Immunization Clinic will begin seeing patients at its new location on 15 June 2026. Existing appointment times remain unchanged.
